diagnostics.message: turtlebot4_navigation references 'action_msgs' but package.xml does not declare it. This reference is indirect and may be a namespace, test-only import, or transitive dependency.

steps: Confirm the reference is required at build or runtime.
Add the dependency to package.xml and run rosdep.
remediation.summary: Declare the referenced ROS package dependency or suppress the finding if it is intentionally external.

diagnostics.title: Possible undeclared dependency

arguments.name: params

limitations: Static analysis cannot prove runtime names, substitutions, remappings, plugin loading, or external nodes.
Orphan endpoint and dependency diagnostics may be satisfied by another repository or installed package.
YAML launch parsing covers standard declarative ROS 2 forms but preserves unsupported dynamic expressions as unresolved.
Runtime TF and QoS behavior should be confirmed on a running system.
